title: Zalem's subterine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Zalemship.jpg|thumb|250px|Zalem's subterine.]]

'''[[Zalem/Legends|Zalem's]] [[subterine]]''' was a space freighter which had been captured by the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] and modified for underground travel. They used it to try to penetrate the [[Star Temple]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 26|''Star Wars'' (1998) 26]]
